description: Intent-only request: classify lead scoring and routing as workflow-anchored with bounded LLM judgment.

conversation.text: When a new lead arrives, score how promising it is from message + company, notify sales if high, send nurture email if low.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the lead scoring is a bounded judgment step feeding enumerable, fixed branches, rather than open-ended runtime decision-making.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
